findings.description: All personas receive perfect compliance=1.0 with zero violations recorded, indicating no actual compliance checking occurred
findings.correction_applied: Implement persona-specific compliance rules and violation injection for testing

findings.description: Combative persona receives high tone=0.9 and continuity=0.8 despite lowest resolution=0.1, suggesting tone metric may reward matching aggressive tone
findings.correction_applied: Add explicit penalty for tone escalation or aggression matching

findings.description: Confused persona receives drastically lower tone=0.3 while combative receives 0.9 under identical compliance, showing inconsistent application across personas
findings.correction_applied: Normalize tone/continuity scoring with persona-adjusted baselines

findings.description: Composite scores remain high (0.485-0.685) with no violations ever recorded, so formula cannot demonstrate appropriate penalization
findings.correction_applied: Weight compliance violations at minimum 50% of composite and require test cases with known violations
